query:
SELECT id, participantId, dayNumber, logDate, noAlcohol, cleanEating, exerciseDone, exerciseDuration, exerciseType, CASE WHEN exerciseProofUrl IS NULL OR exerciseProofUrl = '' THEN 'NO_PROOF_URL' ELSE exerciseProofUrl END AS exerciseProofUrl, reflectionDone, reflectionShared, readTeachDone, dayComplete, pointsAwarded, submittedAt, createdAt, updatedAt
FROM daily_logs
WHERE participantId = 60011
ORDER BY logDate DESC, id DESC
LIMIT 10;

FROM daily_logs
WHERE participantId = 60011
ORDER BY logDate DESC, id DESC
